name: Hot Bacon Dressing & Flaming Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, bacon drippings, lemon juice, and sugar in a saucepan and bring to a strong boil.
2. Dissolve the corn starch in the white wine, then add it to the boiling mixture.
3. Add the bacon pieces and pesto after the dressing has cooled completely. Chilled, this should last several weeks.
1. Heat an amount of the dressing in a pan.
2. Pour 151 rum over the spinach leaves and ignite.
3. Extinguish the flames with the warmed dressing.
